environment.s: environmental violation: $40K in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

labor.s: 4 federal penalties totaling $1.1M since 2000 (Violation Tracker). Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 55/100; CHRB 15.2/26; TVPRA exposure; UK MS statement.

privacy.s: CISA Known Exploited Vulns: 15 CVEs on record (3 in past 12mo); affected products include Mobile Devices, MagicINFO 9 Server.

wiki.extract:
Samsung Galaxy (Korean: 삼성 갤럭시; branded in Japan from 2015 to 2023 only as Galaxy) is a series of mobile computing devices designed, manufactured, and marketed by Samsung Electronics since 2009. 
The product line includes the Galaxy S series of high-end smartphones, the Galaxy Z series of foldable smartphones, the Galaxy A, M, and F series of mid-range and budget smartphones, the Galaxy Tab series of tablets, and the Galaxy Watch series of smartwatches. The Galaxy TabPro S is the first Samsung Galaxy-branded Windows 10 device that was announced at CES 2016. In 2020, Samsung added the Galaxy Ch

health.s: 9 CPSC recalls (1 in past 24 months); latest hazard: front-mounted knobs on the ranges can be activated by accidental contact by huma.

topCves.vulnerabilityName: Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server Path Traversal Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow an attacker to write arbitrary files as system authority.
topCves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

topCves.vulnerabilityName: Samsung Mobile Devices Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: Samsung mobile devices contain an out-of-bounds write vulnerability in libimagecodec.quram.so. This vulnerability could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code.
topCves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

topCves.vulnerabilityName: Samsung Mobile Devices Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: Samsung mobile devices contain an out-of-bounds write vulnerability in libimagecodec.quram.so which allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code.
topCves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

topCves.vulnerabilityName: Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server Path Traversal Vulnerability
topCves.shortDescription: Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows an attacker to write arbitrary file as system authority.
topCves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

topCves.shortDescription: Samsung devices with selected Exynos chipsets contain a use-after-free vulnerability that allows malicious memory write and code execution.
topCves.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle in nonroadway area, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was struck by a powered industrial truck's clamp structure while scanning appliances. The employee suffered a contusion to the ankle (from the truck) and a head contusion (from falling to the floor) and was hospitalized.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle in nonroadway area, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was scanning inbound pieces in the dock area when they were struck by a clamp truck. The employee sustained injury to back vertebrae and a broken foot that required hospitalization.

sampleRecords.event_description: Compressed or pinched by shifting objects or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was working with a helper to change the belt and sheave on an air intake fan. He was manually moving the fan belt while a coworker was pushing it when his gloved left-hand ring finger became caught between the sheave and belt. When he pulled his hand out, the skin came off the first digit of his left ring finger. The first digit had to be surgically amputated.

Recalled Model Numbers NE58K9430SS/AA NE58N9430SG/AA NE58R9431SG/AA NE58R9431SS/AA …
hazards: Front-mounted knobs on the ranges can be activated by accidental contact by humans or pets, posing a fire hazard.
injuries: Samsung has received over 300 reports of unintentional activation of the front-mounted knobs by humans or pets since 2013. These ranges have been involved in approximately 250 fires. At least 18 fire…

sampleRecalls.title: Samsung Recalls Top-Load Washing Machines Due to Fire Hazard; Software Repair Available
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves several models of Samsung's top-load washers with super speed wash. The washers were sold in white, black, champagne, and ivory colors and include model series WA49B, WA50B, WA51A, WA52A, WA54A, and WA55A. The model and serial numbers are found on the washer's label attached to the inside of the t…
hazards: The washing machines can short-circuit and overheat, posing a fire hazard.
injuries: Samsung has received 51 reports of smoking, melting, overheating or fire involving the washers; 10 of which resulted in property damage. Three consumers have reported injuries due to smoke inhalation.

hazards: The washing machine top can unexpectedly detach from the washing machine chassis during use, posing a risk of injury from impact.
injuries: Samsung has received 733 reports of washing machines experiencing excessive vibration or the top detaching from the washing machine chassis. There are nine related reports of injuries, including a br…
